passages.cleanText: Day 5

passages.text: You wake up with a pounding headache. You barely got any sleep last night. [[5.3]]
passages.cleanText: You wake up with a pounding headache. You barely got any sleep last night.

passages.text: You boil water without thinking about it and pour yourself a cup. You stare at the pouch of honey tea. [[5.4]]
passages.cleanText: You boil water without thinking about it and pour yourself a cup. You stare at the pouch of honey tea.

passages.text: *Do you want to end up like the fox? He was trying to warn you, you know?* [[5.5]]
passages.cleanText: *Do you want to end up like the fox? He was trying to warn you, you know?*

passages.text: You push the cup of water off the table. The porcelain shatters on the floor. [[5.6]]
passages.cleanText: You push the cup of water off the table. The porcelain shatters on the floor.

passages.text: I'm fine. I'll be just fine without the tea. [[5.7]]
passages.cleanText: I'm fine. I'll be just fine without the tea.

passages.text: You take the pouch of tea leaves and shove it in your closet. [[5.8]]
passages.cleanText: You take the pouch of tea leaves and shove it in your closet.

passages.text: I need to find out why they've been giving it to me. [[5.9]]
passages.cleanText: I need to find out why they've been giving it to me.

passages.text: You hastily put on your clothes and head out the door. It's 8:30am and you are definitely late. [[5.10]]
passages.cleanText: You hastily put on your clothes and head out the door. It's 8:30am and you are definitely late.

passages.text: You almost forget to pick up the mail. There are letters to Peaches, Ms. Buttons, and Jane D. You head to Casserole Avenue first. [[5.11]]
passages.cleanText: You almost forget to pick up the mail. There are letters to Peaches, Ms. Buttons, and Jane D. You head to Casserole Avenue first.

passages.text: When you arrive, you see Peaches and Ms. Buttons talking on the line between their yards. [[5.12]]
passages.cleanText: When you arrive, you see Peaches and Ms. Buttons talking on the line between their yards.

passages.text: Instead of delivering the mail right away, you hide behind a bush to listen in on the conversation. [[5.13]]
passages.cleanText: Instead of delivering the mail right away, you hide behind a bush to listen in on the conversation.

passages.text: What should I do? He's so close to figuring it out. [[5.14]]
passages.cleanText: What should I do? He's so close to figuring it out.

passages.text: Just distract him. What I always do is.. [[5.15.5]]
passages.cleanText: Just distract him. What I always do is..

passages.text: But he's suspicious of everything. I can't even let him talk to my kids... [[5.16]]
passages.cleanText: But he's suspicious of everything. I can't even let him talk to my kids...

passages.text: Oh there you are Marty! [[5.17]]
passages.cleanText: Oh there you are Marty!

passages.text: You have the mail for us today? [[5.18]]
passages.cleanText: You have the mail for us today?

passages.text: You slink out of your hiding spot. How did they notice you were there?? [[5.19]]
passages.cleanText: You slink out of your hiding spot. How did they notice you were there??

passages.text: You take the letters out of your pouch and shove them to Peaches and Ms. Buttons. [[5.20]]
passages.cleanText: You take the letters out of your pouch and shove them to Peaches and Ms. Buttons.

passages.text: (Looks like someone's in a mood today.) [[5.21]]
passages.cleanText: (Looks like someone's in a mood today.)

passages.text:
Marty! Thank you for delivering the mail.
[["It's my job to." -> 5.22a]]
[["You were talking about me, weren't you? -> 5.22b]]

links.linkText: "You were talking about me, weren't you?
links.original: [["You were talking about me, weren't you? -> 5.22b]]

passages.cleanText: Marty! Thank you for delivering the mail.

passages.name: 5.22a
passages.text: (Haven't been doing much of that these days.) [[5.23a]]
passages.cleanText: (Haven't been doing much of that these days.)

passages.name: 5.22b
passages.cleanText: No, no!

passages.name: 5.23a
passages.text: Maybe you should take a break!  [[5.26]]
passages.cleanText: Maybe you should take a break!

passages.name: 5.23b
passages.text: We were just talking about- [[5.24b]]
passages.cleanText: We were just talking about-

passages.name: 5.24b
passages.text: Our business practices! [[5.25b]]
passages.cleanText: Our business practices!

passages.name: 5.25b
passages.text: But you don't own- [[5.26]]
passages.cleanText: But you don't own-

passages.text: How would you like a 3% discount for my restaurant?? [[5.27]]
passages.cleanText: How would you like a 3% discount for my restaurant??

passages.text: I don't want your artificial food. [[5.28]]
passages.cleanText: I don't want your artificial food.

passages.text: I can up it to 4%! [[5.29]]
passages.cleanText: I can up it to 4%!

passages.text: You stare at them for a few moments. Ms. Buttons has a strained smile on her face. Peaches is trying to force herself to smile too. [[5.30]]
passages.cleanText: You stare at them for a few moments. Ms. Buttons has a strained smile on her face. Peaches is trying to force herself to smile too.

passages.text: Why are they acting so weird?? [[5.31]]
passages.cleanText: Why are they acting so weird??

passages.text: You recoil in disgust. [[5.32]]
passages.cleanText: You recoil in disgust.

passages.text: I don't take bribes. Goodbye, Ms. Buttons. [[5.33]]
passages.cleanText: I don't take bribes. Goodbye, Ms. Buttons.

passages.text: Ms. Buttons had built up twenty years of trust with you. [[5.34]]
passages.cleanText: Ms. Buttons had built up twenty years of trust with you.

passages.text: Brutal honesty, straightforwardness, and hard truths nobody else would tell you. [[5.35]]
passages.cleanText: Brutal honesty, straightforwardness, and hard truths nobody else would tell you.

passages.text: Now, she's conspiring against you. [[5.36]]
passages.cleanText: Now, she's conspiring against you.

passages.text: Twenty years of trust was just broken. But, there's more. [[5.37]]
passages.cleanText: Twenty years of trust was just broken. But, there's more.

passages.text: All this in just the past few days... clearly there is something greater at play. [[5.38]]
passages.cleanText: All this in just the past few days... clearly there is something greater at play.

passages.text: You need answers. And you think you know where to find them. [[5.39]]
passages.cleanText: You need answers. And you think you know where to find them.

passages.text: With the two people running the whole thing. [[5.40]]
passages.cleanText: With the two people running the whole thing.

passages.text: Hello, Honeybee Center. [[5.41]]
passages.cleanText: Hello, Honeybee Center.

passages.text: You walk through the town square and head to the town center. [[5.42]]
passages.cleanText: You walk through the town square and head to the town center.

passages.text: It's quiet today, with only a few animals walking around. You step inside the building. [[5.43]]
passages.cleanText: It's quiet today, with only a few animals walking around. You step inside the building.

passages.tags: excite inside_town_square jane-enter-right jane-neutral marty-happy marty-speaker marty_enter
passages.text: Jane! Is Barnaby in? [[5.44]]
passages.cleanText: Jane! Is Barnaby in?

passages.text: No, Marty. He's in a meeting. [[5.45]]
passages.cleanText: No, Marty. He's in a meeting.

passages.text: But I can pass on a message if you need. [[5.46]]
passages.cleanText: But I can pass on a message if you need.

passages.text: Oh, it's nothing urgent. I'll just leave this fragile mail in his office. [[5.47]]
passages.cleanText: Oh, it's nothing urgent. I'll just leave this fragile mail in his office.

passages.text: Suit yourself. [[5.48]]
passages.cleanText: Suit yourself.

passages.text: Perfect. You've been meaning to do some investigating. If anybody would know what's going on, it's Barnaby. [[5.49]]
passages.cleanText: Perfect. You've been meaning to do some investigating. If anybody would know what's going on, it's Barnaby.

passages.text: You go to deliver the mail, and take a peek inside his office. [[5.50]]
passages.cleanText: You go to deliver the mail, and take a peek inside his office.

passages.text:
Inside there is a desk, a schedule, and a wall of plans for the city. 
[[Investigate the schedule. -> 5.51a]]
[[Investigate the plans. -> 5.51b]]
passages.cleanText: Inside there is a desk, a schedule, and a wall of plans for the city.

passages.name: 5.51a
passages.cleanText: 8:00AM: Wake up.

passages.name: 5.51b
passages.text: You look down at the massive blueprint on the center table. [[5.52b]]
passages.cleanText: You look down at the massive blueprint on the center table.

passages.name: 5.52a
passages.text: 9:00AM: Get the mail. [[5.53a]]
passages.cleanText: 9:00AM: Get the mail.

passages.name: 5.53a
passages.text: 12:00PM: Break for lunch. [[5.54a]]
passages.cleanText: 12:00PM: Break for lunch.

passages.name: 5.54a
passages.text: 1:00PM: Second round... [[5.55a]]
passages.cleanText: 1:00PM: Second round...

passages.name: 5.55a
passages.text: Wait... this is YOUR schedule! [[5.56a]]
passages.cleanText: Wait... this is YOUR schedule!

passages.name: 5.56a
passages.text: You look around the room. There are no other schedules pinned up. [[5.57a]]
passages.cleanText: You look around the room. There are no other schedules pinned up.

passages.name: 5.57a
passages.text:
Why does he have yours?! 
[["He knows I'm figuring something out!" -> 5.58c]]
[["He wants to know where I am, 24/7!" -> 5.58d]]

links.linkText: "He wants to know where I am, 24/7!"
links.original: [["He wants to know where I am, 24/7!" -> 5.58d]]

passages.cleanText: Why does he have yours?!

passages.name: 5.58c
passages.text: But how? And why would he need to know your schedule? [[5.59e]]
passages.cleanText: But how? And why would he need to know your schedule?

passages.name: 5.58d
passages.text: He's stalking me! [[5.59e]]
passages.cleanText: He's stalking me!

passages.name: 5.59e
passages.text: Someone puts their hand on your shoulder. You spin around only to find that it's Barnaby. [[5.60]]
passages.cleanText: Someone puts their hand on your shoulder. You spin around only to find that it's Barnaby.

passages.name: 5.52b
passages.text: It covers the entire thing from edge to edge, notes scrawled in the margins. [[5.53b]]
passages.cleanText: It covers the entire thing from edge to edge, notes scrawled in the margins.

passages.name: 5.53b
passages.text: Notes containing those same symbols you found in the mail... [[5.54b]]
passages.cleanText: Notes containing those same symbols you found in the mail...

passages.name: 5.54b
passages.text: They seem to be written as some sort of code, a language you do not understand. [[5.55b]]
passages.cleanText: They seem to be written as some sort of code, a language you do not understand.

passages.name: 5.55b
passages.text: At the very top is a logo. A very familiar one. [[5.56b]]
passages.cleanText: At the very top is a logo. A very familiar one.

passages.name: 5.56b
passages.text: It's the eye you saw two nights ago, crossed out. [[5.57b]]
passages.cleanText: It's the eye you saw two nights ago, crossed out.

passages.name: 5.57b
passages.text: Beside it, text reads "Oversight Industries. For the buyer's eyes only." [[5.58b]]
passages.cleanText: Beside it, text reads "Oversight Industries. For the buyer's eyes only."

passages.name: 5.58b
passages.text: Below it, an absolutely massive budget for a covert project on the edge of town. [[5.59b]]
passages.cleanText: Below it, an absolutely massive budget for a covert project on the edge of town.

passages.name: 5.59b
passages.tags: big marty-enter marty-serious marty-speaker quiver shake
passages.text: What in the Honey Haven?! [[5.59e]]
passages.cleanText: What in the Honey Haven?!

passages.text:
You've been working so hard recently. Why don't you take a few days off? 
[[Accuse Him -> 5.61a]]
[[Shove Him -> 5.61b]]
passages.cleanText: You've been working so hard recently. Why don't you take a few days off?

passages.name: 5.61a
passages.text: What!? Are you trying to get rid of me? [[5.62a]]
passages.cleanText: What!? Are you trying to get rid of me?

passages.name: 5.61b
passages.text: You shove Barnaby with all your might. [[5.62b]]
passages.cleanText: You shove Barnaby with all your might.

passages.name: 5.62b
passages.text: Get your paws off of me! [[5.63b]]
passages.cleanText: Get your paws off of me!

passages.name: 5.62a
passages.text: No, I'm just trying to get you out of my *office*. [[5.63a]]
passages.cleanText: No, I'm just trying to get you out of my *office*.

passages.name: 5.63a
passages.text: We've noticed that you're a little off recently. You should rest. [[5.64a]]
passages.cleanText: We've noticed that you're a little off recently. You should rest.

passages.name: 5.64a
passages.text: I don't need rest! I need *answers*! [[5.65c1]]
passages.cleanText: I don't need rest! I need *answers*!

passages.name: 5.65c1
passages.text: Barnaby fixes you with an intense stare. [[5.66c]]
passages.cleanText: Barnaby fixes you with an intense stare.

passages.name: 5.63b
passages.text: Barnaby stumbles back and puts up his paws to block. [[5.64b]]
passages.cleanText: Barnaby stumbles back and puts up his paws to block.

passages.name: 5.64b
passages.text:
You're making a huge mistake, Marty! 
[["WHY DO YOU HAVE MY SCHEDULE?!" -> 5.65c2]]
[["WHAT ARE YOU BUILDING?!" -> 5.65c2]]
[[Punch him in the stomach! -> 5.65b1]]
passages.cleanText: You're making a huge mistake, Marty!

passages.name: 5.65c2
passages.text: Barnaby fixes you with an intense stare. [[5.66c]]
passages.cleanText: Barnaby fixes you with an intense stare.

passages.name: 5.65b1
passages.text: You attempt to punch him in the gut. [[5.66b1]]
passages.cleanText: You attempt to punch him in the gut.

passages.name: 5.66c
passages.text: Don't come to work tomorrow. [[5.67c]]
passages.cleanText: Don't come to work tomorrow.

passages.name: 5.67c
passages.text: He walks away before you can continue. [[5.74]]
passages.cleanText: He walks away before you can continue.

passages.name: 5.66b1
passages.text: Barnaby catches you by the hand and slams you to the ground. [[5.67b1]]
passages.cleanText: Barnaby catches you by the hand and slams you to the ground.

passages.name: 5.67b1
passages.text: The marble is cold and hard, Barnaby's weight pressing you into it. [[5.68b1]]
passages.cleanText: The marble is cold and hard, Barnaby's weight pressing you into it.

passages.name: 5.68b1
passages.text: I highly suggest you don't try anything. I'm a whole lot bigger than you are, and I have training. [[5.69b1]]
passages.cleanText: I highly suggest you don't try anything. I'm a whole lot bigger than you are, and I have training.

passages.name: 5.69b1
passages.text: If I were you, I'd make sure not to look me in the eyes for the next week. [[5.70b1]]
passages.cleanText: If I were you, I'd make sure not to look me in the eyes for the next week.

passages.name: 5.70b1
passages.text: I don't know what's gotten into you, but whatever it is, it's a danger not just to you, but the whole town. [[5.71b1]]
passages.cleanText: I don't know what's gotten into you, but whatever it is, it's a danger not just to you, but the whole town.

passages.name: 5.71b1
passages.text: Drop it, Marty. [[5.72b1]]
passages.cleanText: Drop it, Marty.

passages.name: 5.72b1
passages.text: Oh, and one last thing.. [[5.73b1]]
passages.cleanText: Oh, and one last thing..

passages.name: 5.73b1
passages.text: Don't come to work tomorrow. [[5.74]]
passages.cleanText: Don't come to work tomorrow.

passages.text: Time passed faster than it felt like, and soon it is night. You pace around your room. [[5.75]]
passages.cleanText: Time passed faster than it felt like, and soon it is night. You pace around your room.

passages.text: I knew it! They're all hiding something from me. [[5.76]]
passages.cleanText: I knew it! They're all hiding something from me.

passages.text: The city plans, the schedule, the looks everyone gave you.. it doesn't paint a very good picture now does it? [[5.77]]
passages.cleanText: The city plans, the schedule, the looks everyone gave you.. it doesn't paint a very good picture now does it?

passages.text: You feel a bumbling energy within you, completely opposite to the deadness you've felt the last few days. [[5.78]]
passages.cleanText: You feel a bumbling energy within you, completely opposite to the deadness you've felt the last few days.

passages.text: As you prepare to sleep, you see a weirdly shaped paw slowly reach out from inside your closet. It beckons you closer. [[5.79]]
passages.cleanText: As you prepare to sleep, you see a weirdly shaped paw slowly reach out from inside your closet. It beckons you closer.

passages.text: You stare at it, not budging. [[5.80]]
passages.cleanText: You stare at it, not budging.

passages.text: The paw pulls a letter out from your closet and drops it on your nightstand. [[5.81]]
passages.cleanText: The paw pulls a letter out from your closet and drops it on your nightstand.

passages.text: You scramble to pick up the letter. [[5.82]]
passages.cleanText: You scramble to pick up the letter.

passages.text: "You're so close to the truth. Tomorrow it will all become clear." [[5.83]]
passages.cleanText: "You're so close to the truth. Tomorrow it will all become clear."

passages.text: End of Day 5.
passages.cleanText: End of Day 5.

passages.text: What I always do is... [[5.15]]
passages.cleanText: What I always do is...
